instruction: Write a NASM x86-64 Linux program that prints exactly 'Hello\n' and exits with code 0.
Write a NASM x86-64 Linux program that prints exactly '42\n' and exits with code 0.
Write a NASM x86-64 Linux program that prints nothing and exits with code 0.
Write a NASM x86-64 Linux program that prints exactly 'A\nB\n' and exits with code 0.
Write a NASM x86-64 Linux program that prints nothing and exits with code 7.
